markdown:
#  Why can't I turn OFF the 'Action Required' emails sent from the Submittals tool? 
##  Answer 
If you are an active Procore user and the Ball In Court responsibility for completing an action on a submittal has shifted to you (see [Change the Ball in Court on a Submittal](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/change-the-ball-in-court-on-a-submittal)), the system will automatically deliver an 'Action Required' email to you when one of the following statements is true:
  * You are included in the first step of the submittal's workflow and **Create & Send Emails** was clicked when the submittal was created.
  * The submittal workflow step before the step you are included in was completed.
  * You are included in the current step of the submittal's workflow, your own response is pending, and **Update & Send Emails** was clicked when the submittal was updated.
  * You are included in the current step of the submittal's workflow, your own response is pending, and another response in that step was completed.


Because a member of your project team has listed you as optional or required to perform an action by a set due date for a submittal's workflow, 'Action Required' notifications cannot be turned OFF. However, users with 'Admin' level permission do have the ability to configure other automatic email notifications that are sent by the Submittals tool. To learn more see, [Who receives an email when a submittal is created or updated?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-who-receives-an-email-when-a-submittal-is-created-or-updated)
## See Also
  * [Who receives an email when a submittal is created or updated?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-who-receives-an-email-when-a-submittal-is-created-or-updated)
  * [What are the user roles in the Submittals tool?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-the-user-roles-in-the-submittals-tool)
  * [What gets copied over to a new project from a project template?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-gets-copied-over-to-a-new-project-when-applying-a-project-template)


**Ball In Court**. Shows the name of the person responsible for completing the next action.
title: Why can't I turn OFF the 'Action Required' emails sent from the Submittals tool?
